title: The Stranger Next Door
content: For nearly a year, Daniel knew almost nothing about the man living in the apartment next to his. They occasionally exchanged polite greetings in the hallway, but their conversations never lasted more than a few seconds. Still, Daniel often wondered about him. Late at night, soft piano music sometimes drifted through the walls, creating a calm atmosphere inside the building. One evening, during a sudden power outage, the two neighbors unexpectedly started talking while waiting together in the dark hallway. Hours passed as they shared stories about work, relationships, and the strange isolation of city life. Daniel realized afterward how easily people could live side by side for years while remaining complete strangers to one another.
